name: Infinitrack Tunneller
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>無</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>む</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>限</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>げん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>起</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>動</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>どう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>スクレイパー
desc: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 5 EARTH Machine monsters in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Tunneller" once per turn.
mnst_eff: You can Tribute 1 EARTH Machine monster; Special Summon this card from your hand in Defense Position. You can banish this card from your GY, then target 5 EARTH Machine monsters in your GY; shuffle them into the Deck, then draw 2 cards. You can only use each effect of "Infinitrack Tunneller" once per turn.

action: Returns from your Graveyard to your Deck
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
banished: Banishes itself from Graveyard for cost
